use_cases: Fashion brand landing pages to showcase collections and product categories
E-commerce hero sections introducing ready-to-wear and accessories lines
Retail website headers with animated category navigation lists
ai_summary: A sophisticated fashion e-commerce hero section featuring a two-column layout with a model portrait image and bold brand typography. The component includes an animated product category list with hover effects using motion/react. Soft pink accent glow adds visual depth while maintaining a clean, minimalist aesthetic suitable for luxury or contemporary fashion brands.
